description.ko: 무한한 우주의 심연 속에서 성운의 장막과 별먼지가 읽을 수 없는 부재를 고요히 감싼다.
description.en: A silent field of nebular veils and star dust surrounds an unreadable absence in the infinite cosmic deep.

prompt: VOID-3 Cosmic Deep: an endless abyssal starfield where the nebula has thinned into vast, translucent veils of #3D1A78 ultraviolet gas stretched across the frame like silent auroras in deep space. At the center is no object, no portal, and no singularity, only a broad region of pure #0D0221 absence where the stars seem to have forgotten how to shine. Dense clouds of #E6E6FA star dust gather into uneven constellations of tiny luminous grains, drifting with extremely slow motion as if suspended in cold cosmic water. Across the darkness, sparse #7B68EE lavender ion threads form faint, broken glyph-like traces that never resolve into language, suggesting a hidden abyssal intelligence beneath the infinite void. Mysterious cosmic horror majesty, high particle density, restrained lavender glow, cold volumetric haze, immense scale, ultra-detailed deep space nebula texture, silent and solemn atmosphere.
